e6_energy_consumption.description: Total energy consumption within the organisation (in Joules or multiples), including energy from renewable and non-renewable sources

e6_scope1_emissions.description: Total Scope 1 GHG emissions in metric tonnes of CO2 equivalent

e6_scope2_emissions.description: Total Scope 2 GHG emissions in metric tonnes of CO2 equivalent

e6_scope3_emissions.description: Total Scope 3 GHG emissions in metric tonnes of CO2 equivalent, if reported
e6_scope3_emissions.notes: Leadership indicator. Check for: absolute figure, methodology, category boundary, reduction target

e6_ghg_methodology.description: Name of the accounting methodology used for GHG inventory (e.g. GHG Protocol, ISO 14064)

e6_climate_target.description: Whether the company has disclosed an emissions reduction target, including baseline year, target year, and scope coverage
